description: Freya SEO is an SEO agency specializing in SEO for AI search and multilingual SEO, helping businesses rank higher and grow in global markets.

What IS That?

Special Tailored AI Tools & Multilanguage SEO

We’re Freya SEO, a multilingual SEO and growth studio working with businesses across Europe. We speak your customers’ language, like literally. English, Greek, German, Turkish, don’t worry, we’ve got it covered.

No confusing jargon. No reports nobody reads. No dashboards that need a manual. Just clear strategies that bring real traffic, real leads, and real growth.

Why Freya SEO

Search isn't just Google anymore. It's ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity — and whatever shows up next. If your business isn't visible there too, you're already a step behind.

Real growth, not vanity numbers — we care about traffic that turns into customers.

Decisions backed by data — never based on guesswork.

Multilingual Strategies — English, Greek, German, etc. Not translation, real speakers.

Tailor-made Automations — you wish, we build them.

We explain things clearly — no fancy words, no confusion.

Our Work Principles

We keep things clear, honest and useful, no jargon, no empty reports, no promises we can’t back up with data. Whatever we build for you, AI SEO, automation, dashboards or custom tools, it’s judged by one thing: Does it actually make your business easier to find and easier to run.

See Services

Advantages

Brand Awareness

More Leads

Advanced Visibility

AI-Based Results

Services

What I Offer

AI SEO

Search is changing fast, and we make sure you keep up. We help you show up in classic Google search and in the new world of AI search. All SEO strategies are wrapped into one clear plan.

Automation

Blog drafts, product descriptions, social media posts, email drafts, competitor checks, even chatbot replies, we build smart, AI-powered automations that take repetitive tasks off your team's plate. So your people can spend time on the work that actually needs a human.

Reporting

We collect data into one clean dashboard, updated automatically and explained in plain language, not analyst-speak. See what's working, catch problems early, and make decisions with confidence instead of a spreadsheet headache.

Tool Generation

Off-the-shelf tools not quite cutting it? We build custom tools and integrations that connect your CRM, your ERP, and more!

Process

How To Work?

Get Started

Let's Meet

First things first, let's meet and understand each other. You can text, or schedule a quick online meeting.

First Report

We'll create a report that will show the process and details of your website.

Contract

If you like to work, you'll receive a contract.

Let's Begin

Now it's show time! We'll rank your website #1 on Google and AI.

SEO Marketing Guide

Here you can find SEO tips, news or updates that I share.

AI SEO

Future-Proof Strategies

View Articles

Discover how artificial intelligence is reshaping search engines. Read my guides on AI-driven content, predictive analytics, and next-gen ranking factors.

SEO Tips

Actionable Insights

View Articles

Master the art of search engine optimization with my hands-on tutorials, technical audits, and proven tactics to climb the Google rankings.

Content Marketing

Engage & Convert

View Articles

Learn how to craft compelling narratives that resonate with your audience, build brand authority, and turn casual readers into loyal customers.

Let's Grow Together Before Competitors

Grow your business on Google and AI, and be prepared for the next generation!
  • Grow your business
  • Data Driven
  • AI SEO
View Achievements

FAQs

Still have Qs?

Find answers to common questions about SEO, AI and more!

Let's Talk
What's the difference between "normal" SEO and AI SEO?

Normal SEO gets you found on Google. AI SEO gets you found and recommended by tools like ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity, which more and more people use instead of typing into a search bar. Same goal, new playing field, and we cover both.

Do I need all four services, or can I just pick one?

Just one, totally fine. Most people start with AI SEO or Reports and add the rest later, once they see it working. We'll never push you into something you don't need.

How long until I see results?

SEO isn't instant magic, anyone who promises that is lying. You'll usually notice the first real movement in traffic and rankings within 2–3 months, with stronger results building from there. Automations and dashboards, on the other hand, can save you time from week one.

We already have a marketing team. Can you work alongside them?

Absolutely, that's actually our favorite setup. We plug into your existing team, hand over dashboards and automations they can use directly, and make everyone's life easier instead of stepping on toes.

Pavlina Hörmann

SEO Manager

Certificates Get In Touch

Let’s Grow Your Organic Presence

Tell us about your business and we’ll show you exactly where you stand, and where you could be.
